+++
title = "Supported Languages and Frameworks"
description = "Programming languages and frameworks supported by Noir with feature compatibility details."
weight = 1
sort_by = "weight"

+++

Each table below shows the supported frameworks per language and their feature compatibility: endpoint, method, query, path, body, header, cookie, static_path, websocket, `--include-callee` callee extraction, and `--ai-context` buckets such as guards, sinks, validators, and signals.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED-->
